prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDRUSHKIT-7PC-BUNDLE Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Gold Rush Gold Prospecting Kit Classifiers Vials Sifting Pans - 7pc Description: Strike it rich with the ASR Outdoor 7pc Gold Prospecting Kit. This set comes with everything you'll need to sift, locate and contain gold and minerals while out gold panning.

In the kit we've included 1 of our most popular sizes of sifting classifiers: 1/2". These sifting classifiers are designed to fit on a 5 gallon bucket. Additionally we've added in 2 different sized sifting pans featuring riffles: 10" and 14" diameters respectively.

A few of the other items included are a snifter bottle, a tweezer with a magnifier and 2 glass vials for containing your gems once they've been sifted. This is a great kit for beginners and intermediate gold prospectors.

Please note: colors and contents may vary. Search Terms: gold prospecting supplies mining tools classifier screen kit for adults geology rock hammer Features: - Size of Classifier Screen: 1/2" - Sizes of Gold Pans: 10" & 14" Diameter - Size of Gold Vials: 1 1/3 Dram - Tweezer w/ 4x Magnifier - Capacity of Snifter: 4 fl oz === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 7-pc Gold Prospecting Kit with Classifier Pans

tokens.name: Gold Prospecting Kit with Classifier Pans

anthropic.title_differentiation: 10 And 14 Inch Sifting Pans, 12 Inch Classifier, Glass Vials, Tweezers With Magnifier, Snifter Bottle

openai.title_differentiation: Half Inch Bucket Classifier, 10 Inch And 14 Inch Riffled Pans, Snifter Bottle, 4X Magnifier Tweezers, 2 Glass Vials
